summary_en: Ward 1 resident and Jubilee Housing neighbor Gilma Merino endorses Jackie Reyes-Yanes for DC Council. After knowing Jackie since 1982, Gilma highlights her decades of community service, advocacy, and commitment to Ward 1 residents.
summary_es: Gilma Merino, residente de Ward 1 y vecina de Jubilee Housing en Adams Morgan, respalda a Jackie Reyes-Yanes para el Concejo de DC. Tras conocerla desde 1982, destaca su trayectoria de servicio comunitario, liderazgo y compromiso con las familias de Ward 1.
title_en: Gilma Merino Endorses Jackie Reyes-Yanes for Ward 1 DC Council | Community Leader Since 1982
title_es: Gilma Merino Respalda a Jackie Reyes-Yanes para el Concejo de Ward 1 | Líder Comunitaria desde 1982
source: Gilma Merino - Ward 1 resident and Jubilee Housing neighbor
